criteria.name: AI-Powered Recommendations
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to provide personalized product recommendations based on user preferences, shopping history, and browsing behavior.

criteria.name: Intelligent Search and Discovery
criteria.description: The app employs AI to understand natural language queries and provide relevant product suggestions, even refining searches with follow-up questions.

criteria.name: Review Summarization
criteria.description: The app summarizes product reviews using AI, highlighting key aspects such as durability, quality, and value for money.

criteria.name: Personalized Shopping Experience
criteria.description: The app adapts the shopping experience in real-time according to the visitor's interests and behavior, curating product displays and suggestions.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Customer Support
criteria.description: The app uses AI-powered chatbots to provide instant customer support, answer frequently asked questions, and recommend products based on shopping history.

criteria.name: Virtual Try-On
criteria.description: The app offers virtual try-on technology, allowing users to visualize clothing and accessories on themselves or models.

criteria.name: AI-Enhanced Product Imagery
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to generate high-resolution product photos in diverse scenes and layouts, enhancing visual appeal.

criteria.name: AI photo editing
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to retouch your photos and generate new backgrounds.
criteria.sources: AI Background Remove&Generate, Pebblely AI, CreatorKit ‑ AI Image & Video
